title: cordia goetzei
intro: Cordia goetzei, also known as the Goetze's Cordia or African Cordia, is a plant species from the Borreria genus, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, the leaves and bark of Cordia goetzei have been used in various folk remedies, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cordia goetzei include treating fever, wounds, and various skin conditions, as well as acting as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Cordia goetzei, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
